data.title: Top 2 Defensive Stocks That May Keep You Up At Night In March
Nvidia Acquires Synthetic Data Firm Gretel To Train AI Models: Report
data.description: Nvidia (NASDAQ: NVDA) has acquired synthetic data startup Gretel in a deal exceeding $320 million. The acquisition strengthens Nvidia's AI capabilities, integrating Gretel's technology into its cloud-based services. With new products launched at the GTC event, Nvidia is set to enhance AI models, including generative tools and humanoid robotics, driving innovation in AI training and infrastructure.
